MASTER CALENDAR ON JUN-06-2022. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT BRYAN HUNT SET FOR JUN-17-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2022 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-06-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 220, JUDGE KATHLEEN A. KELLY. RAMSEY HANAFI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT BRYAN HUNT APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. DEFENDANT JENNA LIDDELL APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT VIA COURTCALL. PLAINTIFF WAIVES JURY TRIAL. DEFENDANT BRYAN HUNT WAIVES JURY TRIAL. DEFENDANT JENNA LIDDELL DID NOT POST JURY FEES. THE COURT ASSIGNS THE CASE AS A COURT TRIAL. THE COURT DENIES DEFENDANT BRYANT HUNT'S REQUEST FOR CASE MANAGEMENT AND DISCOVERY. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPARTMENT 220 NO LATER THAN 4:00 PM TODAY VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL. THE COURTROOOM CLERK'S TELEPHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES. THE COURT SETS AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT BRYAN HUNT FOR JUN-17-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. TIME ESTIMATE: 1 DAY. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-17-2022 ISSUED TO SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT BRYAN HUNT IS DISCHARGED AND ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. SANCTIONS PAID. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
